title: MountCam
description: This mod make it so that when you get onto a mount it immediately puts you in third person. This is useful for a quick transfer and will automatically put you in first person when you get off the mount.
body:
MountCam makes it so that when you get into any vehichle it puts you into third person!

It doesnt just work wth vehichles though. It also works with all rideable mobs.

Changing the settings is super simple so you can customize what will hapen when you get on or off of a vehichle/animal.

You can even disable things entirely allowing for full customization! :)

![Config](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/67e757588cc558b4b06394eda68eb25f28cfc2ca.jpeg)

(customization and all mount support is only available for 26.1+)
